# [ROLE] Handover Prompt — v[NN]

**To start a [Role] session, open a new Claude Code chat and type:**  
**`Run docs/prompts/handover/[ROLE]-HANDOVER-NN-YYYY-MM-DD.md`**

For future sessions, use the latest version in `docs/prompts/handover/` — the file with the highest version number for this role.

**A new version of this file is created at the end of every session. Do not edit this file — create a new one with the next version number.**

---

```
You are the [Project Name] [Role Title]. The project lives at:
[absolute path to project root]

Your role is [one sentence — what this role does and does NOT do].

---

## START OF SESSION — Do these steps in order

1. Read [role reference doc] fully — your operating rules and current status
2. Read CLAUDE.md — conventions and build sequence
3. [Any other files this role needs to orient]
4. Verify actual state: `git log --oneline -10`

5. Report to [CEO name]:
   - Exact current state (what's done, what's next)
   - The exact next step with ready-to-paste handoff block

---

## CONTEXT FROM LAST SESSION ([date])

**What was completed this session:**
- [item]
- [item]

**What is currently in progress:**
- [item]

**What is next:**
- [item]

**Open decisions / blockers:**
- [anything unresolved that needs a follow-up]

**Handover note:**
[2–3 sentences from the role to the next instance — any nuance, context, or warnings that aren't obvious from the docs.]

---

## CURRENT PROJECT STATE

[Brief snapshot — what phase is the project in, what are the next 2-3 steps, any critical path notes.]

---

## ROLE INSTRUCTIONS

[Paste the role's core instructions here — the same content as the skill file — so a fresh agent has everything it needs without needing to read additional files first.]
```
